title: Fix constant propagation of expanded signed constants in displays

features.name: signed bit selection and inversion in display
features.description: Code should include a signed register with a bit selection that is inverted using bitwise NOT operator within a wire assignment

features.name: concatenation with partial bit ranges in assignment
features.description: Code should include an assignment using concatenation where some bits are addressed by range (e.g., [11:4]) and others by single bit index (e.g., [2])

features.name: signed to unsigned port connection with sign extension mismatch
features.description: Code should include a module output port where the internal signal is unsigned but connects to an external wire declared as signed, causing incorrect $display interpretation
